name: White Bean & Tropical Fruit Chutney
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon chipotle pepper (minced with adobo sauce)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large pan.
2. Saute the chipotle peppers (with adobo sauce) until fragrant.
3. Add onion and garlic; cook for 5-7 minutes.
4. Stir in sugar and diced mango and pineapple.
5. Cook for several minutes, then add liquids (lime juice, orange juice, balsamic vinegar, dry vermouth).
6. Simmer until thickened, about 1/2 hour.
7. Stir in the drained white beans. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
